basic_details.job_title: BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (BRIC THSTI) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Apprentice. Candidates with Diploma, Graduation Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BRIC THSTI official website thsti.res.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.9,000/- for Graduates and Rs.8,000/- for Diploma holders

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
